creator: alex.ribper@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #6)


Ok,

I will wait :)

So far, i am using a VM with Debian to use the new features of Cgx-2.12 ..
on the other hand, ccx-2.12 runs allright in *BSD... i even added some features to it ( mainly some material models, and a Python wrapper to evaluate transient B.C. CLOADs and DLOADs ...) but my models are quite huge... my latest one was the structural dynamic response of a Submarine Internal+External Hulls to an UNDEX blast... so running them in a VM would be unpractical...  thanks god i only need the VM to build the mesh and inspect results...

I will wait :)

Best regards,

Alex
